series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Emergency Management Agency - Mitigation Records
series_metadata.series_description: All records concerning federal mitigation projects which document the expenditure of, use of and accounting for grant funds, including but not limited to plans, planning guidance, grant guidance, agreements, budgets, cash requests and supporting materials, audit reports and project information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain current year plus three years from the date of the federal "Final Financial Report" for the applicable grant, and until the State Single Audit has been completed, and then until no longer of administrative value. The Ohio Emergency Management Agency, as grantee, is required to retain all records related to real property acquisition projects permanently. ; Electronic: Retain current year plus three years from the date of the federal "Final Financial Report" for the applicable grant, and until the State Single Audit has been completed, and then until no longer of administrative value. The Ohio Emergency Management Agency, as grantee, is required to retain all records related to real property acquisition projects permanently. The database that contains some mitigation project information is called "State Hazard Analysis Resource and Planning Portal (SHARPP).", Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
